subject: Fact Checking the Fact Checker
body:
Fact Checking the Fact Checker No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Fact Checking the Fact Checker](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Cincinnati Enquirer is supposed to be the local paper of record. The one local folks go to who still read the paper - which is evidently a smaller and smaller population every year. My wife and I still get it, but I think they're down to two families on our block that do (including us.) Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-i/) [McCain and Me](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-d/)Since word came out that John McCain had passed away over the weekend, there have been many tributes to this Arizona Senator, American war hero, and almost-President. Rather than repeat a lot of what you've probably seen or heard since then, I thought I'd touch on a number of interactions I've had with him over the years. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Democrat Candidates for Congress are Misleading the Public](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-u/)
Democrats running for congress across the country are doing everything they can to mislead the public on a number of key issues. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [V](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-n/)[ice President Pence Comes to Cincinnati](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjijtitt-kujkulhluu-p/)
The Vice President of the United States was in town yesterday and I had the honor of introducing him at a panel discussion. I thought I'd give you a rundown of our day. Click below to read more. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:

If the current trend does not change, the Miami-Dade area could soon find itself under water. But before that, it is facing another kind of **[water crisis: a shortage of drinking water](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q_6lJkqTHiYPte-Uw47DcqDwynjGjK4AqkH1NrSm3bo=/Mk19u27hmgVvhl_8LqQMdk6e2vmuzLhcMzKZ7RxLLcM=)** that could make this beautiful, vibrant city an uninhabitable place. [**This is just the beginning of a huge climate problem our state is facing**.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q_6lJkqTHiYPte-Uw47DcqDwynjGjK4AqkH1NrSm3bo=/Mk19u27hmgVvhl_8LqQMdk6e2vmuzLhcMzKZ7RxLLcM=) >From rising sea-levels that would render much of the state uninhabitable to seeping saltwater and contaminants rendering Florida's aquifers undrinkable, it's apparent that no other state is as vulnerable to the effects of climate change as Florida. And yet, for years, Governor Scott, CFO Patronis and the rest of the Florida Cabinet made it a policy to not even utter the words, "climate change." **It 's time for change.** [Help JR fight climate change. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q_6lJkqTHiYPte-Uw47DcqDwynjGjK4AqkH1NrSm3bo=/DRP5peKVNS7os8A9_9sMnZIUQrWyWCT1fUnm_IBOzbs=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) In January 2019, we will finally start looking towards solutions rather than ignoring the problem. As your next CFO, I will prioritize the awareness of climate change, combating its impact while taking steps to both prevent and reduce damage on our land - this includes tackling Miami's looming water problem. But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't get there without your help.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 today, to help me get to the Cabinet - and fight the effects of climate change here in Florida?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q_6lJkqTHiYPte-Uw47DcqDwynjGjK4AqkH1NrSm3bo=/DRP5peKVNS7os8A9_9sMnZIUQrWyWCT1fUnm_IBOzbs=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: They're peddling lies, and it's abhorrent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Larry Hogan just aired another false TV ad.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b921/7ab0e2c4/7e2b4b08/3498a781/3631521461/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-two-months?refcode=OHQ09068A") Friend, Recently, Larry Hogan released a new TV ad -- and this one isn't any truer than the last. He's now claiming, "We have not had a single tax increase in the entire time I've been governor." Except that's not even close to true: Over the past few years, tax increases have included both a higher gas tax _and_ a higher state income tax -- and we're still not fully funding our schools or giving working families a fair deal on healthcare. This comes on the heels of a blatantly false ad where Republicans selectively edited a statement to imply Ben calls himself a socialist. Clearly, the standards of honesty have disappeared for Larry Hogan just as much as his fellow Republican Donald Trump. **Today marks exactly two months until Election Day -- which is why we know that they won't stop putting false ads on the air unless they know voters aren't buying it.** [**Marylanders deserve the truth, plain and simple. Help get the truth out to voters about Larry Hogan's lies and Ben's bold plans for Maryland: Donate $5 or more right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b921/7ab0e2c4/7e2b4b08/3498a781/3631521461/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-two-months?refcode=OHQ09068A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b921/7ab0e2c4/7e2b4b08/3498a780/3631521461/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-two-months?refcode=OHQ09068A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

So far, Governor Larry Hogan and the Republican Governors Association have spent more than $2 million on airing false ads like these. We know that in this two month sprint to November, they will spend millions of their special interest money to spread these lies.
It's because they're afraid. They're afraid of big plans and big ideas -- ones that propel this campaign and will propel Maryland forward. Despite Republicans' million-dollar media blitz, the fact is that living in Maryland has gotten less affordable under Larry Hogan. No amount of money can cover that up.
**We can fight back with our sharpest weapon -- the truth. subject: Two Seats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

As my colleague in the Senate this past year, I've seen Tina Smith go right to work solving problems for Minnesotans.

She listens, she brings people together to get results, and -- make no mistake -- she will do what it takes to get the job done.

Tina is committed to getting the job done for the people of our state, but _she 's also facing one of the only special elections for the U.S. Senate in 2018._ Tina is up to the challenge, but I know firsthand that she needs you on her side to win an election this big.

The truth is, to win in November we're _both_ counting on your grassroots support -- so **will you chip in to our campaigns today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Tina Smith and me will go through immediately:_

#
# **_Senate Democrats’ Disingenuous Double Standard for Supremely Qualified Kavanaugh_**
#
“Times have changed for Senate Democrats,” Sen. Thom Tillis (R-NC) writes in _The Daily Signal_ about Judge Brett Kavanaugh’s confirmation hearing this week. “Why are they dropping the Kagan standard and adopting a double standard, demanding millions of additional documents that are both deeply sensitive and largely irrelevant?” he asks. “Perhaps it’s because it isn’t about reaching an informed decision at all.” [**Click here to read more**.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTM4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDUzODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNjk1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/09/05/senate-democrats-disingenuous-double-standard-for-supremely-qualified-kavanaugh/) “If President Reagan was alive today, upon hearing about Bob Woodward’s latest book on the Trump presidency I imagine him delivering one of his most famous lines: ‘There you go again,’” David Bossie writes in [**Fox News**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTM4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDUzODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNjk1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&http://www.foxnews.com/opinion/2018/09/05/woodward-didnt-dare-write-about-trumps-accomplishments-fear-is-designed-to-help-dems-win-in-november.html). “President Trump is the ultimate political outsider who was elected by the American people to come to Washington to confront the entrenched D.C. establishment and failed status quo that Bob Woodward has reported on for almost 50 years.” “President Trump said Wednesday that he won’t back down in trade talks with Canada,” S.A. Miller reports in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTM4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDUzODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNjk1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/sep/5/trump-straightening-out-these-horrible-trade-deals/). “Look, we have a very strong position and we are the ones people want to come in and take advantage of,” the President said from the Oval Office. “We are straightening out these horrible trade deals.” In [**_The Sacramento Bee_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTM4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDUzODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNjk1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.sacbee.com/opinion/op-ed/soapbox/article217795565.html), Interior Secretary Ryan Zinke and Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue write that the Trump Administration is helping California contain the recent wildfire threat. “For too long, our forest management efforts have been thwarted by lawsuits from misguided, extreme environmentalists,” the two write. “President Trump has rightly recognized that the old way was doing a disservice to our precious national forests and the communities that depend on them.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTM4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDUzODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNjk1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTM4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDUzODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNjk1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTM4MTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDUzODExMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyNjk1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

body:
** Yard Signs are going fast!
------------------------------------------------------------
Campaign season is really ramping up, which means our team is busier than ever. Right now our campaign only has two paid staff, which means that volunteers have had to step up and take charge of much of the work that goes into this campaign, so I just want to take a second to give them some recognition. Thank you so much, to everyone who has volunteered.

If you don't have your Ian Todd yard sign yet you can sign up here (https://goo.gl/forms/YftSqv4hm6CPggiq2?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=b4b678064f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_06_12_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-b4b678064f-9291445) and we will try to get it out to you as soon as possible. You can also help us restock, and fund our Get Out the Vote efforts by Donating to the campaign (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=Sep5th&amount=100&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=b4b678064f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_06_12_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-b4b678064f-9291445) .

Donate Today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=Sep5th&amount=100&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=b4b678064f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_09_06_12_45&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-b4b678064f-9291445)

** Limited Edition T-Shirts?
------------------------------------------------------------
We have a bit of a surprise, we are putting up a billboard and we wanted to make it stick out. So we hired a local Minnesota artist to draw up a billboard for us, and we loved it so much we decided to put it on a T-Shirt too. Check out the design below.

We will be sharing more information on how to get one of these limited edition T-Shirts more in the near future so keep your eyes out for more information.

body:
It's been a crazy summer for me and I honestly don't know where the time goes. I kept meaning to sit down and write this email, but then life would pop up, things got away from me, and now here we are |
---

| | Peter, It's been a crazy summer for me, and I honestly don't know where the time goes. I kept meaning to sit down and write this email, but then life would pop up, things got away from me, and now here we are -- in September and about two months away from a big election.

My guess is you've seen a lot of celebrities in your inbox lately, telling you what they care about and asking you to care too. The hope is a few more people open the email, a few more people donate, and a few more people turn out to vote. Sometimes it works. But honestly, as I go through them in my inbox, a lot of them just don't move me. They don't hit home.

**So here 's the deal. I'm writing this email to you because I actually want to. I've known and supported Joe Donnelly a long time, but I've known and loved Indiana even longer.

This is going to be a frank email, and it's going to be a long email.

I'm hoping you'll take a few minutes to read it -- [and I'm hoping it will convince you to support Joe once you're done.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2c1c/7377f838/3b694b15/51f81566/2970728171/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-astin?refcode=20180906.1&amount=10")**

My ties to Indiana started when I met my wife, and since then it's become a second home to me. It's where she was born and raised, and it's where we go for weddings and to spend our family holidays.

Later, I had another opportunity to get to know the state when I was presented with the amazing opportunity to star in the film _Rudy_. The film was an incredible experience for me, and it opened my eyes to an extraordinary world of excellence and brotherhood that is singularly Hoosier. Coming back to Indiana is like coming back home -- and that's why the current state of politics breaks my heart.

We've stripped our words of meaning in politics, or turned them into stereotypes and attacks -- a way to discredit people without ever hearing them out. We've somehow lost our ability to have real conversations.

Why can't we sit down and say, _" Accessing health care is still a problem for a lot of people. Let's talk about how we can lower costs for people while still protecting small businesses."_

Why can't we sit down and say, _" We've made a lot of progress, but our criminal justice system is still seriously flawed, and it's hurting a lot of people. How do we make it better?"_

Why can't we sit down and say, _" People are dying from opioid and drug addiction all over the country. How do we help communities manage this epidemic, and how do we save lives and get people back on their feet?"_

What about those questions makes them partisan, Peter? What about them is intrinsically "Democrat" or intrinsically "Republican?"

The reality is -- they're not.

These are the kinds of conversations we should be having with each other. And these are definitely the kind of conversations our elected officials should be having at the highest level of government.

**It 's pretty clear that Joe has to represent a state with stark political divides. But he also has to be a leader on the issues he knows, at his core, he was elected to fight for. Balancing those two responsibilities is a tall order, and it's one that would weigh heavily on anyone.**

But Joe's approach is the right one -- and it's the one I wish more elected officials would take. He brings people together and he starts conversations -- not to win them, but to learn from them -- and then he works each and every day until he gets things done.

**I 'm supporting Joe Donnelly in this election because I believe in what he fights for, and I believe in how he fights for it. From the bottom of my heart, I hope you'll do the same.**

Please donate to Joe if you can. | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2c1c/7377f838/3b694b15/51f81566/2970728171/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-astin?refcode=20180906.1&amount=10")**
---
Yours truly,
Sean Astin

|

---

But now, Bob Hugin is once again ignoring New Jersey voters by supporting Trump's far-right Supreme Court Nominee.

Then Donald Trump nominates judicial extremist Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court - a nominee who will fight to overturn Roe v. Wade , discriminate against patients with pre-existing conditions, and roll back environmental protections. But now, Bob Hugin is once again ignoring New Jersey voters by supporting Trump's far-right Supreme Court Nominee. "" The people of New Jersey deserve a leader who will back up his words with action. Not someone who will say one thing, then when push comes to shove, side with Trump instead of us. It's clear that Bob Hugin is not an independent voice for New Jersey. He would just be another vote for Trump's agenda in the Senate. "" Thank you, Frank Frank Schultz Campaign Manager Menendez for Senate "" | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""

The National Taxpayers Union (NTU), has awarded me the [“Taxpayers’ Friend Award”](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=4a5f626099&e=7ca82c1e3d) for having _**the top voting record in Arizona and the 3rd best nationally**_ in support of lower taxes, limited government, and economic freedom. I was one of just 66 members of the House of Representatives to earn the reward and as one of my top supporters, I’m proud to let you know.

NTU included [198 House votes](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=370af5f01d&e=7ca82c1e3d) in the 2017 scorecard and their rating calculates voting records on fiscal responsibility by evaluating _every _vote that has an impact on tax, spending, trade, and regulatory policy. This year I scored 90%, compared to the House average of just 51%.

**_I’ve kept my commitment to the people of Arizona and the 4th District and now I’m asking for your commitment._**

We have less than two months until the election day and I have just $200,000 in my campaign account. The average House race costs more than $1 million but I’ve been focused on my job as your congressman and not spent the time it takes to raise money. **_And there isn’t much time._**

Can I count on your donation today? I don’t like asking anymore than you like being asked but it’s part of the job and I rely on the generosity – and patriotism – of supporters like you.

Click [here](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=2b65db9c8e&e=7ca82c1e3d) if you are committed to helping me keep up the fight and make a donation of $25, $100, $250, or even $500 to our campaign.

I’m excited about this award, proud to have you on my team, and committed to fighting alongside President Trump to Make America Great Again!
---

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: You are the swing vote.
body:
Peter,
Have you seen any of Brett Kavanaugh’s confirmation hearings on TV?
If you have, then no doubt you’ve witnessed the hostility from the liberal left towards the sanctity of life and religious liberty, principles that Kavanaugh’s record has proven to uphold.
Shouts from protesters filled the hearing room...women yelling in defense of Roe v. Wade. This was no coincidence. The highly organized Women’s March took credit on Twitter for the more than 30 women arrested for their disruption of the hearing.
Already this is a Supreme Court confirmation hearing unlike any we’ve ever witnessed.
Peter, the liberal left is feeling the weight of Barak Obama’s famous 2008 saying, “elections have consequences.” They recognize they may lose leverage on issues that are interwoven with our faith, namely the sanctity of life and religious liberty.
These hearings will go on and Judge Kavanaugh will hopefully be confirmed as the next Supreme Court justice.**But in just two months voters will head to the polls once again - and those outcomes are not as certain.**
The elections for Congress are heated. Democrats only need 23 seats to flip the House and 2 seats to gain a majority control of the Senate. Don’t be under any illusions, the pro-abortion advocates such as the Women’s March are organizing in unbelievable numbers to mobilize voters.
At this point, nothing is guaranteed. The right and the left are desperately trying to mobilize their bases and appeal to key swing voting blocks. But there’s a reality few in politics have fully recognized and accepted.
**Independents aren’t the swing voters in this election. Christians are.**
**Did you know only 61% of Evangelical Christians voted in the 2016 election?**
Midterm election turnout is always lower than in Presidential elections. That means a staggering 50 million Christians will choose to stay home...unless we motivate and equip them to use their voice through their vote.
Technology has greatly advanced from the days of knocking on doors to get out the vote. And the secular pro-abortion left knows this. They use technology to their advantage to mobilize their base and get them to the polls.
We won’t sit back while those advancing anti-Christian values utilize every tool at their disposal.
**[My Faith Votes has a proven strategy to mobilize the largest block of Christian voters in the country - but I need you to help me carry it out](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180906apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180906apl01nd&n=1).** Like the secular left, we have the ability, and plan, to leverage cutting-edge technology to reach and equip faith voters.
The My Faith Votes’ electronic Personal Voting Assistant helps Christians in churches, on campuses, and in their places of work get ready to cast their ballot. It makes it easy to register, request absentee ballots, locate polling places, and receive election reminders.
And let me tell you, it’s working. 85% of people who used My Faith Votes’ Personal Voting Assistant - voted! That’s 44% higher than the national average.
We need to reach Christians before November and equip them with the Personal Voting Assistant.
If we don’t engage Christians to fight to defend the most important principles in the public square, then where will this end? Will we cede to pro-abortion liberal activists the power to advance these and other leftist policies at taxpayers expense and silence those with whom they disagree?
**[We can’t do this without your support. We are less than 2 months away from the election](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180906apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180906apl01nd&n=2)!**
Will you join me in activating our faith by **[donating your best gift today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180906apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180906apl01nd&n=3)** to remind our fellow Christians to get out and vote for the most vulnerable Americans in our society?
Let’s be the ones who determine the outcomes in these elections!
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180906apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180906apl01nd&n=4)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180906apl01nd&n=5)
P.S. Even when you don’t think your vote will make a difference that doesn’t negate your God-given ability and responsibility to vote your values. My vote + Your vote = My Faith Votes! Through our prayers and contributions, we can be part of mobilizing millions of Christians to the polls.
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

The elections for Congress are heated. Democrats only need 23 seats to flip the House and 2 seats to gain a majority control of the Senate. Don’t be under any illusions, the pro-abortion advocates such as the Women’s March are organizing in unbelievable numbers to mobilize voters. At this point, nothing is guaranteed. That means a staggering 50 million Christians will choose to stay home...unless we motivate and equip them to use their voice through their vote. The White House • September 6, 2018
## The latest Trump Economy myth: Wages are stagnant
##
##
**The Trump Administration’s critics** are in a bind: During the 2016 election, many claimed that then-candidate Donald J. Trump’s economic policies wouldn’t work—in fact, that they would likely trigger a major recession. Nearly a year and a half into his term, the results are undeniable. **Nearly 4 million jobs** have been created since the election, including 400,000 in manufacturing. New unemployment claims recently**[hit a 49-year low](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTYzMTgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDU2MzE4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyOTMzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/wall-street-journal-layoffs-just-reached-half-century-low/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**. Almost 3.9 million Americans have been lifted off food stamps. The economy is on track to hit its highest annual average growth rate in more than 13 years. **Looking for a new talking point,** the left found one: Jobs, stocks, and economic growth may be soaring, but pay is not. “Worker wages remain stagnant,” _ThinkProgress_ declared in July. **Except pay isn’t stagnant** —not by a longshot. A new report from the Council of Economic Advisers this week explains the origins of that misleading stat. According to the CEA, official wage growth estimates often ignore key parts of the real compensation that workers receive. Among other problems, these measures exclude the value of crucial benefits such as health insurance, taxes, and paid leave. **Real wage compensation** has grown by 1.4 percent over the past year, well above inflation growth. CEA’s estimate translates to more than $1,000 of additional income each year for the average American household. [**Get the facts: American workers are seeing bigger paychecks**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTYzMTgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDU2MzE4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyOTMzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/american-workers-seeing-wages-rise-thanks-president-donald-j-trumps-pro-growth-agenda/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Read the full report** : [**How much are workers really getting paid?**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTYzMTgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDU2MzE4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyOTMzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cea-report-much-workers-getting-paid-primer-wage-measurement/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Democrats’ double standard on Judge Kavanaugh
##
**Flash back to June 2010:** Solicitor General Elena Kagan appeared before the Democratic-majority Senate for her confirmation hearing to the U.S. Supreme Court. “The Senate did not demand that the Obama administration provide the tens of thousands of pages from Elena Kagan’s tenure as Solicitor General,” Ethics and Public Policy Center President Ed Whelan writes in [**_National Review_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTYzMTgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDU2MzE4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyOTMzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.nationalreview.com/bench-memos/dems-latest-documents-hullabaloo/). **“Never mind that Kagan** , in stark contrast to Kavanaugh, had zero judicial experience and that her SG records would have been the materials most probative of her legal thinking,” Whelan continues. **Naturally, Senate Democrats** should take the same principled stand for executive privilege when examining records for Judge Brett Kavanaugh. Instead, less than one minute into this week’s confirmation hearing, Democrats began calling to adjourn the session altogether, citing insufficient information about the nominee. **In fact** , “the Judiciary Committee has received the most comprehensive set of documents ever provided by a nominee to the Supreme Court, receiving more executive branch documents than the past five Supreme Court nominees combined,” Sen. Thom Tillis (R-NC) wrote yesterday. **“These documents are in addition** to the most relevant portion of Kavanaugh’s extensive record; namely, the 307 opinions he authored as a judge on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit,” Sen. Tillis added. [**“Senate Democrats’ Disingenuous Double Standard”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTYzMTgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDU2MzE4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyOTMzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/09/05/senate-democrats-disingenuous-double-standard-for-supremely-qualified-kavanaugh/) **Something to share** : [**_The New York Times_ on Kavanaugh vs. Kagan**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA2Ljk0NTYzMTgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNi45NDU2MzE4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgyOTMzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1037742472183652352)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: today, we crossed the attack ad threshold
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Speaker Paul Ryan's Super PAC, the Congressional Leadership Fund, put an ad up on television today, attacking my integrity and my commitment to keeping this country safe.
| | Peter, When we told our children I was running for Congress, my daughter's very first question was, "Will people say mean things about Mommy?" In response, my husband looked at her straight in the eyes and said, "Yes, but if they do, it's because Mommy's doing a good job." That's a hard conversation to have with your children, but the reality is, he's right. Despite all the other measures of our success -- our volunteers, events, ratings changes, and fundraising -- today is the day that we officially crossed the attack ad threshold. **Speaker Paul Ryan 's Super PAC, the Congressional Leadership Fund, put an ad up on television today, attacking my integrity and my commitment to keeping this country safe.** Desperation breeds desperate attacks, so we know they take me seriously as a threat, and we will counteract them with our own positive message. [**Peter, will you contribute to my campaign today, to ensure that we can continue to share my story -- who I am and what I am working for -- with voters across VA-7?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/yVdr-xXPUbN2oiSr2-JrKnUDSqUdcQ6VzDiHcBWqLeQ=/t5F2Ors0vZCbuWV65kW8bO1GZMc9aLCyfvwhRp8OHTQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.06_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) I know that voters in our community are tired of the kind of misleading, negative advertisements that characterize our politics today. And I believe that they will see past them and find, in our campaign, a refreshing, positive alternative to this unfortunate status quo. Thank you, Peter, for [**your continued support.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/yVdr-xXPUbN2oiSr2-JrKnUDSqUdcQ6VzDiHcBWqLeQ=/t5F2Ors0vZCbuWV65kW8bO1GZMc9aLCyfvwhRp8OHTQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.06_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Here's to electing leaders to Washington who are committed to elevating our political discourse, and making service -- not smear attacks -- the key measure of success. Thanks, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/yVdr-xXPUbN2oiSr2-JrKnUDSqUdcQ6VzDiHcBWqLeQ=/t5F2Ors0vZCbuWV65kW8bO1GZMc9aLCyfvwhRp8OHTQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.06_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/yVdr-xXPUbN2oiSr2-JrKnUDSqUdcQ6VzDiHcBWqLeQ=/t5F2Ors0vZCbuWV65kW8bO1GZMc9aLCyfvwhRp8OHTQ=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. clean_body: Speaker Paul Ryan's Super PAC, the Congressional Leadership Fund, put an ad up on television today, attacking my integrity and my commitment to keeping this country safe. | | Peter, When we told our children I was running for Congress, my daughter's very first question was, "Will people say mean things about Mommy?" In response, my husband looked at her straight in the eyes and said, "Yes, but if they do, it's because Mommy's doing a good job." That's a hard conversation to have with your children, but the reality is, he's right. Despite all the other measures of our success -- our volunteers, events, ratings changes, and fundraising -- today is the day that we officially crossed the attack ad threshold. Speaker Paul Ryan 's Super PAC, the Congressional Leadership Fund, put an ad up on television today, attacking my integrity and my commitment to keeping this country safe. Desperation breeds desperate attacks, so we know they take me seriously as a threat, and we will counteract them with our own positive message. I know that voters in our community are tired of the kind of misleading, negative advertisements that characterize our politics today. And I believe that they will see past them and find, in our campaign, a refreshing, positive alternative to this unfortunate status quo. Thank you, Peter, for Here's to electing leaders to Washington who are committed to elevating our political discourse, and making service -- not smear attacks -- the key measure of success. Thanks, \- Abigail Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. body:
Team, it's this simple: to secure the future of the middle class, we need to invest in education and workforce development in our district. But as long as Tom McClintock is our Congressman, the only thing we'll get is more favors and back-scratching for wealthy special interests.
We know you're on board with our plan for what our district really needs. But it's up to us to stand up and fight for it. [_**Read our note and sign our one-click petition to stand with us and support real solutions for our district.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bm9CqvAp8q6FvLcwuPofvww5yIHUZcETU15vmaHowgc=/PEKWkRaGhqNqsZuuuTd2mLFS42rTfCW83t726tNGAK0=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180906_TM_20180906-taxbillkicker_all_l1)
Team Morse

From: Team Morse
Date: Tues, Sep 4, 2018
Subject: how to truly support our district
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bm9CqvAp8q6FvLcwuPofvww5yIHUZcETU15vmaHowgc=/nuJmimm-b_0Bkt768F-2fyUvwe7hyQyUq1I-6LXS3b0=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180906_TM_20180906-taxbillkicker_all_logo)
Team,
Celebrating Labor Day weekend got us thinking about what it really takes for a working person to get ahead and build a future in our community--and all the ways having Tom McClintock as our representative makes that more difficult.
**McClintock has consistently voted to put profits before people** --most blatantly by voting for a tax bill that benefits special interests while raising taxes on ordinary Americans.
McClintock pretends that votes like this will help families get ahead--but something that would really help is (for starters) increasing access to affordable community college and vocational and technical training programs. These programs support local jobs and set students up for the careers of tomorrow without leaving them drowning in debt.
But instead of ensuring there are opportunities in Calaveras County for job training partnerships and other programs that help build the workforce our local businesses need, McClintock voted for a tax plan that prioritizes wealthy special interests over our middle-class families.
**Tom McClintock 's priorities are wrong for our district. We need to invest in our workforce and we need to elect a representative who'll commit to those investments--that's Jessica. If you agree, add your name with one click now:**
[ADD MY NAME ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bm9CqvAp8q6FvLcwuPofvww5yIHUZcETU15vmaHowgc=/nuJmimm-b_0Bkt768F-2fyUvwe7hyQyUq1I-6LXS3b0=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180906_TM_20180906-taxbillkicker_all_addmyname)

McClintock has had ample opportunities to vote for the investments our communities need to get ahead--but instead, he's lining the pockets of his corporate donors.
[**We need to put people 's economic futures ahead of corporate profits. Add your name if you agree.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bm9CqvAp8q6FvLcwuPofvww5yIHUZcETU15vmaHowgc=/nuJmimm-b_0Bkt768F-2fyUvwe7hyQyUq1I-6LXS3b0=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180906_TM_20180906-taxbillkicker_all_l2)

Team Morse

Hello -

My name is Ellie Perez, and I am excited to be joining Team Stanton as your new Field Director. Congressional District 9 is my home district. trying to rescind Obama-era rules that govern how to protect
student loan borrowers from fraud and deception.

and for-profit colleges. DeVos doesn’t care about students, and
she certainly doesn’t care if they’re taken advantage of. While
I’m working to alleviate students from the burdens of school
debt, DeVos’s actions are aiding lenders, not students and their
futures.

( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-devos-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_WL_180906_1_1_no&amount=15&recurring=1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

When students make the decision to go to college, they

clean_body: Our nominee to the Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh, is going through the Senate confirmation process this week and the way Tammy and her...... Friend, If you needed another example of how Tammy Baldwin is failing to represent our Wisconsin values, just turn on your TV. Our nominee to the Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh, is going through the Senate confirmation process this week and the way Tammy and her Democratic allies are treating him, you’d think he was a criminal on trial – not up to serve on our highest court! The Resist movement and Senate Democrats have reached new lows. They’re distracting, obstructing, and completely neglecting their job to confirm our nominees. And Tammy Baldwin is following suit with every outrageous move. Now, it’s time for us to tell Tammy Baldwin to do her job and confirm Kavanaugh. Friend, these tactics are not how we get things done in Wisconsin. Heck, Tammy Baldwin wouldn’t even meet with Judge Kavanaugh before saying she’d vote no! That’s certainly not the Wisconsin Way. By obstructing the confirmation process, liberals are obstructing the American people AGAIN. Politicians like Tammy Baldwin won’t take on the establishment and stand up for you, your rights, or YOUR Supreme Court nominee. But friend, I always will fight for you, our values and the middle class. In the Senate, I will work to give Wisconsin a voice when talking with presidential appointees, and I will vote to confirm qualified nominees so we can get things DONE for America. I’m tired of Washington not working for us, but if Tammy wins in November... we’ll only have to deal with more ineffective obstructionists preventing America’s success. We can’t let that happen. We have to make sure we win in November. And right now, we need to make sure Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed for the Supreme Court: Let’s tell Tammy Baldwin and anyone else who’s listening that Wisconsinites deserve effective leadership – not obstruction. It’s time to confirm! Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Dave Driscoll, The Sanders Institute
subject: This Saturday - Rise For Climate Justice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Click here to find a Rise For Climate, Jobs & Justice march near you.
#
Friend,
We have a responsibility to leave a better world for our children and grandchildren. **[This Saturday, September 8th, we have the opportunity to come together, have our collective voice be heard and demand a fair and fast transition to 100% renewable energy. Click here to find a Rise For Climate, Jobs& Justice march near you.](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a978/bed43eb/78c13bbe/75fcae6b/784856571/VEsH/ "https://riseforclimate.org/")**
Climate change is real, it is caused by human activity, and it is having devastating effects around the world and here at home in the United States.
Rising temperatures in the Gulf have strengthened hurricanes such as Harvey in 2017, and have exacerbated the Red Tide to extreme levels, killing wildlife and impacting communities and businesses down the Florida coastline.
In California, global warming has resulted in higher temperatures and less rain causing devastating wildfires to spread at an alarming rate, burning 1.4 million acres in 2018 alone. The raging Mendocino Complex has now become the largest fire in the state's history, burning 450,000 acres.
Stronger and more erratic storms, rising sea levels, extreme heat around the world - the impacts of global warming and the climate crisis are not going to go away. We must come together to force the change that our planet needs.
**[This Saturday, September 8th, join the Rise for Climate, Jobs& Justice at one of the thousands of rallies in cities and towns around the world to call for a fast and fair transition to 100% renewable energy. Sign up for an event in your city today, and join the movement.](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a978/bed43eb/78c13bbe/75fcae6b/784856571/VEsE/ "https://riseforclimate.org/")**
Thank you for staying engaged,
Dave Driscoll
Executive Director
The Sanders Institute

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb4f5/24c69fd9/24ed735ff/188651df/16077324/VEsH/ "http://emilyslist.org/run-to-win?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1&source=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1")
---

Peter,

Run to Win is coming to D.C.!

We're excited to join the Congressional Black Caucus Foundation for their Annual Legislative Conference to give a Run to Win 101 candidate workshop.

You don't need to be a declared candidate or even actively planning to run to attend. You just have to have an interest in learning the basics of being a candidate for state or local office. _You also do not need to be an attendee of the conference to attend._

**[Apply to attend our Run to Win 101 workshop in D.C. on Thursday, September 13th, 2018.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb4f5/24c69fd9/24ed735ff/188651d8/16077324/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180830_email_DCTraining?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Apply+to+attend+our+Run+to+Win+101+works&utm_campaign=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1&source=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1")**
**WHAT:**
Run to Win 101
A free workshop for pro-choice Democratic women thinking about running for elected office

**WHEN:**
Thursday, September 13th, 2018
4:00 p.m. -- 6:00 p.m.

**WHERE:**
Washington, D.C.
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb4f5/24c69fd9/24ed735ff/188651d9/16077324/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180830_email_DCTraining?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1&source=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1")
We'll guide you through the nuts and bolts of planning your run, teach you how to get your campaign in order, and get you ready to take the first steps toward running -- and winning.

Space is limited and seats are being offered on a first-come, first-served basis.

**Submit your application to attend this Run to Win 101 workshop:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Run-To-Win-DC](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb4f5/24c69fd9/24ed735ff/188651da/16077324/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20180830_email_DCTraining?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgRunToWinDC&utm_campaign=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1&source=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1")**

Hope to see you there,

Mũthoni Wambu Kraal
Vice President of National Outreach and Training, EMILY's List

P.S. Can't make the workshop but know someone who might be interested? Forward this email to them!

| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb4f5/24c69fd9/24ed735ff/188651db/16077324/VEsD/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1&source=WQENEU10_digital_email_20180906_RtWDCTraining_v2s1")

body:
|

| | | Did you see Martin's note yet, friend? Hitting this goal will help power our work for this weekend and beyond so we can turn out as many Democrats as possible in November!

**_[You can contribute here to support our grassroots organizing and help restock our supplies!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-sept?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+You+can+contribute+here+to+support+our+g&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2")_**

\-- Thanks from the Heinrich Field Staff

_Begin original message from Martin Henrich:_

I'm overwhelmed.

I'm an engineer, and I don't get overwhelmed easily. But as I've been traveling through our great state, I've felt that more and more.

I'm overwhelmed by the crowds who come to support our campaign, I'm overwhelmed meeting amazing New Mexicans and hearing their incredible stories, I'm overwhelmed by the volunteers who tirelessly give their time, weekend after weekend, to make our state and our country a better place.

**_[In fact, the grassroots energy has been so strong that we're running low on organizing supplies.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-sept?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+In+fact+the+grassroots+energy+has+been+s&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2")_**

I'm being totally serious (sorry, I have a dry sense of humor): because of the enthusiasm that has us all excited about the elections, **we 're going to run out of supplies before the weekend!**
**[SUPPLY OUR VOLUNTEERS](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-sept?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+SUPPLY+OUR+VOLUNTEERS&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2")** Now's the most important time to keep our ground game going at the highest level, team. That's why I'm asking for your help today.

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-sept?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2")** I'll be honest: my opponents -- including Gary Johnson -- have the advantage when it comes to super PACs and special interest money helping out behind the scenes, but I prefer a far different course. I'm relying on grassroots supporters and donors like you to win this race.

That's why it's so important we hit this goal before the weekend so our teams have everything they need to get the word out.

**_[You can support our grassroots programs by donating here before our deadline tomorrow->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-sept?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+You+can+support+our+grassroots+programs+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180906_2_2")_**

Thank you for all you do,

Martin

name: Kathy Manning
subject: We did it! (thank you)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | August was our biggest test yet of the campaign. And I'm happy to report that **thanks to all of your support and hard work, we passed with flying colors.** When President Trump came to town last month to stump for our opponent, Rep. Ted Budd, you all responded. We worked around the clock. And to top it all off, our volunteers made over 3,000 calls to voters in a _single_ day! | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542799d/e3b7d3/5d660175/25553fa6/155663435/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180906?refcode=kme180906_m&recurring=true")
---
We didn't just hit our August fundraising goal -- **we crushed it.**
This race continues to garner national attention. The _New York Times_ highlighted us as one of the **_"13 faces that tell the story of 2018."_** This used to be a race no one thought we had a chance of winning -- and we turned it into one of the closest-watched and most competitive House races around.
Families in North Carolina are ready for a change. They're tired of a Congressman who works harder for special interest groups than he's ever worked for his constituents. From Greensboro to Statesville, you can practically feel the energy and enthusiasm crackling in the air.
Of course, we're not done yet. This month we're up against an even more important deadline: **_The final FEC Quarter deadline of the entire election._** We've got a $65,000 goal to hit and a lot of work to do to get there.
But I'm 100% confident we can get there -- because I have faith in you and I've seen what this team can do.
Thank you for every effort you've made so far. I can't really tell you how much I appreciate it.
Kathy
| | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542799d/e3b7d3/5d660175/25553fa6/155663435/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180906?refcode=kme180906_m&recurring=true")
---

clean_body: | | | August was our biggest test yet of the campaign. And I'm happy to report that thanks to all of your support and hard work, we passed with flying colors. When President Trump came to town last month to stump for our opponent, Rep. Ted Budd, you all responded. We worked around the clock. And to top it all off, our volunteers made over 3,000 calls to voters in a single day! | "" We didn't just hit our August fundraising goal -- we crushed it. This race continues to garner national attention. The New York Times highlighted us as one of the "13 faces that tell the story of 2018." This used to be a race no one thought we had a chance of winning -- and we turned it into one of the closest-watched and most competitive House races around. Families in North Carolina are ready for a change. They're tired of a Congressman who works harder for special interest groups than he's ever worked for his constituents. From Greensboro to Statesville, you can practically feel the energy and enthusiasm crackling in the air. Of course, we're not done yet. This month we're up against an even more important deadline: The final FEC Quarter deadline of the entire election. We've got a $65,000 goal to hit and a lot of work to do to get there. But I'm 100% confident we can get there -- because I have faith in you and I've seen what this team can do. Thank you for every effort you've made so far. I can't really tell you how much I appreciate it. Kathy | | "" | | | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
